prompt: A dramatic sports editorial scene featuring a professional male footballer wearing an all-black kit, reclining confidently on top of an oversized soccer ball. The ball is hyper-detailed with realistic panels and branding, placed on a glossy reflective floor. The athlete’s pose is relaxed yet powerful, with one arm hanging down and legs extended, showcasing strength and elegance. The background is a bold deep blue studio with massive “GOAL” typography in large, subtle shadowed letters. High-contrast studio lighting with sharp highlights and deep shadows sculpting the body. Clean, minimal composition with a luxury sports campaign aesthetic. Shot with an 85mm lens, ultra-realistic, cinematic lighting, crisp details, 8K resolution, Nike/Adidas-style commercial photography.
